name: zpl-engine-mcp
description: v3.3.1: multilingual keyword detection (RO/FR/DE/ES/IT) + uniformity penalty for propaganda-style uniform text + hardened limitations disclaimers. Mathematical stability engine. 59 tools (55 unique + 4 backwards-compat aliases) for measuring balance and bias in finance, gaming, AI/ML, security, and crypto data. AIN is a STABILITY measurement only — never prediction or advice. v3.3 adds zpl_balance_check / zpl_balance_compare / zpl_balance_pair / zpl_balance_rank as preferred names (legacy zpl_decide / zpl_versus / zpl_compare / zpl_rank still work).
author: Ciciu Alexandru-Costinel — Zero Point Logic <cicicalex20@gmail.com>
